chapter_title.en: Chapter 61 – How was the origin of the choice

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/233)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/233)
text: وَ بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنْ يَعْقُوبَ بْنِ سَالِمٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فِي الرَّجُلِ إِذَا خَيَّرَ امْرَأَتَهُ فَقَالَ إِنَّمَا الْخِيَرَةُ لَنَا لَيْسَ لِأَحَدٍ وَ إِنَّمَا خَيَّرَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) لِمَكَانِ عَائِشَةَ فَاخْتَرْنَ اللَّهَ وَ رَسُولَهُ وَ لَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُنَّ أَنْ يَخْتَرْنَ غَيْرَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) .

en.hubeali: And from him, from Abdullah Bin Jabala, from Ali Bin Abu Hamza, from Abu Baseer – similar to it.
And by this chain, from Yaqoub Bin Salim, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding the man when he gives a choise to his wife. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘But rather, the choice is for us<sup>asws</sup> and not for anyone (else), and rather Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> gave a choice to Ayesha at her place, so she chose Allah<sup>azwj</sup> and His<sup>azwj</sup> Rasool<sup>saww</sup>, and it was not for her that she chooses other than Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 6. Through the same chain of narrators as that of the previous Hadith the following is narrated from Ya’qub ibn Salim from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “About the case of a man who gives his wife the choice abu ‘Abd Allah, Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The choice is only for us and not for anyone else. The Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, gave the choice because of the words of ‘A’ishah. They then chose Allah and His Messenger and they must not have chosen anyone other than the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause.’”
